productDisplayName: Disney Kids Girl's Pooh And Tree White Kidswear
description: CompositionWhite round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton with bright blue puff sleeves and ruffles, piping around neckline and armholes, ruffles in front of neckline, side tie-ups on the hemline and Pooh and Piglet graphic on the front Wash care1. Machine wash in cold water with gentle cycle using mild detergent2. Wash dark colours seperately3. Do not bleach4. Do not soak or wring5. Dry inside-out6. Do not tumble dry7. Do not iron on print and studsFittingComfort FitThis cute white Pooh and Piglet tee from disney is perfect for your little princess. Pooh and Piglet will keep her company while she romps around in the park or runs around with her friends. The cotton tee will keep your little one comfortably dry and it can be teamed with denim shorts or skirts for an enjoyable outing. Add on a pair of pretty footwear from the crocs collection available at myntra, include colourful jibbitz, and transform your little darling into a princess.
